data.enablement_token: The API key provided is an enablement token and should be used to request a new API key from the board. If you have already performed this step in the past, here or elsewhere, it is strongly encouraged that you use the existing API key. Otherwise, any attempt to read or write with old API keys will fail.

data_description.host: Update the IP address or hostname if your Vestaboard has connected on a different network interface and its address has changed.

data.model: Select your Vestaboard color to change the image that is generated

strategy.name: Default transition
strategy.description: Configure the default transition settings for this Vestaboard. Note: This only changes the behavior of this integration.

data_description.strategy: Animation style when a new message is sent.
data_description.step_size: Number of columns/rows/bits to animate at the same time. Leave blank to animate one at a time.
data_description.step_interval_ms: Delay between starting each animation step. Leave blank for immediate sequential activation.

options.diagonal: Diagonal (top left corner to bottom right corner)

message.name: Send message
message.description: Send a message to a Vestaboard.
